mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, #{content}, #{isRead}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, from_user_id, to_user_id, content, is_read, create_time FROM chat_messages WHERE (from_user_id = #{userId1} AND to_user_id = #{userId2}) OR (from_user_id = #{userId2} AND to_user_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM chat_messages WHERE to_user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
